videos.title: Sometimes, the more you learn about something, the more curious you become. Follow that curiosity.
videos.author: freeCodeCamp.org
videos.description: Sometimes, the more you learn about something, the more curious you become. Chris talks about following that curiosity with Quincy on the freeCodeCamp podcast.

videos.title: Build Your Own AI Agent – Full Course with OpenAI, Langchain, Render Deployment
videos.author: freeCodeCamp.org
videos.description: Learn to build and deploy intelligent AI agents that bridge the gap between LLMs and real-world automation to handle complex research and data analysis. This comprehensive course takes you from zero to deployment, using OpenAI and Node.js to create a production-ready tool complete with a PostgreSQL

videos.title: Did you know...Instagram didn't start off as a photo-sharing app?
videos.author: freeCodeCamp.org
videos.description: Did you know...Instagram didn't start off as a photo-sharing app? Ania shares a bit of its history here.

videos.title: Have you used the has selector in CSS? According to Chris Coyier, it's a game-changer.
videos.author: freeCodeCamp.org
videos.description: Have you used the has selector in CSS? According to Chris Coyier, it's a game-changer, and he discusses it (and other relatively new stuff in CSS) with Quincy on the freeCodeCamp podcast.
